reviews.review_description: Best anime game on VR!! Even tho it is short, I keep coming back just to pause and look at the visuals. This is the only game I do not regret buying on VR. I hope they make more games like this in the future.
I am a fan of the novels and the anime, and now I am also a fan of this game. Loved it, well deserved 5 stars. I hope they make a S&W VR 3 or add more content to this one, I'm looking forward to it.
